cvText: Dominik Lewandowski — Security Engineer Summary Experienced security engineer with 8 years in banking. Most recently at PKO BP, leading initiatives for a team of 7 building fraud detection hardening using OWASP, SIEM, SOC, ISO 27001. Experience PKO BP | Security Engineer | 2020–Present - Delivered fraud detection hardening with OWASP, SIEM, SOC, ISO 27001. - Collaborated with a team of 7 to ship features used by thousands of users. - Improved reliability, performance, and developer experience across services. - Introduced automation, monitoring, and quality gates in CI/CD. - Worked with facts embedded in CV: OWASP, PKO BP, SIEM, team of 7, penetration testing, SOC, ISO 27001. Earlier roles Built internal platforms, integrated third-party APIs, and supported production systems in banking companies. Led migrations, refactors, and on-call rotations while maintaining high service levels. Education MSc Computer Science, Warsaw University of Technology Additional notes Throughout my career I have partnered closely with product managers, designers, and stakeholders to deliver reliable software in fast-moving environments. I value clear communication, pragmatic architecture decisions, and measurable outcomes. I regularly mentor junior engineers, facilitate code reviews, and contribute to engineering guidelines. I am comfortable working in cross-functional squads, participating in incident response, and translating business goals into technical roadmaps. I have experience with agile ceremonies, backlog refinement, and production support. I focus on observability, automated testing, and incremental delivery. I enjoy learning new tools when they solve real problems and I document decisions so teams can maintain systems confidently after launch. In previous roles I improved deployment frequency, reduced defect rates, and helped teams adopt better engineering practices. I am motivated by ownership, craftsmanship, and building products that users trust every day. jobOffer: We are hiring a Security Engineer to join our banking product team. You will work on fraud detection hardening and collaborate with engineers using OWASP, SIEM, SOC, ISO 27001. We expect hands-on experience with OWASP, PKO BP, and modern delivery practices. You will partner with a team of 7 squads, participate in architecture discussions, and improve reliability of customer-facing services. Bonus if you have led migrations, mentored teammates, or contributed to platform standards. We offer hybrid work, competitive compensation, and opportunities to grow into technical leadership while staying close to code.
